mapper.insert: INSERT INTO generation_task (task_id, material_id, subject_preset, topic, question_types_json, difficulty, requested_count, status, agent_run_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.taskId}, #{po.materialId}, #{po.subjectPreset}, #{po.topic}, #{po.questionTypesJson}, #{po.difficulty}, #{po.requestedCount}, #{po.status}, #{po.agentRunId}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE subject_preset = VALUES(subject_preset), topic = VALUES(topic), question_types_json = VALUES(question_types_json), difficulty = VALUES(difficulty), requested_count = VALUES(requested_count), status = VALUES(status), agent_run_id = VALUES(agent_run_id), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM generation_task ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (question_id, task_id, material_id, type, difficulty, subject_preset, prompt, options_json, answer_text, analysis_text, source_refs_json, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.questionId}, #{po.taskId}, #{po.materialId}, #{po.type}, #{po.difficulty}, #{po.subjectPreset}, #{po.prompt}, #{po.optionsJson}, #{po.answerText}, #{po.analysisText}, #{po.sourceRefsJson}, #{po.status}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE type = VALUES(type), difficulty = VALUES(difficulty), subject_preset = VALUES(subject_preset), prompt = VALUES(prompt), options_json = VALUES(options_json), answer_text = VALUES(answer_text), analysis_text = VALUES(analysis_text), source_refs_json = VALUES(source_refs_json), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
